title: Uppsala University Tuition Fee Waiver

documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through Uppsala University's online scholarship portal during the admissions period.
application_instructions: Apply through Uppsala University's online scholarship portal during the admissions period.

instructions: Apply via Stockholm University's scholarship application system alongside your programme application.
application_instructions: Apply via Stockholm University's scholarship application system alongside your programme application.

title: Stockholm School of Economics Scholarship

title: ERC Starting Grant
amount: Up to EUR 1.5 million over 5 years
eligibility: Early-career researchers (2–7 years post-PhD) who want to establish or consolidate their own research team in Europe. Open to any nationality.
documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through the ERC Funding & Tenders Portal with a host institution in an EU Member State or associated country.
application_instructions: Apply through the ERC Funding & Tenders Portal with a host institution in an EU Member State or associated country.

title: Marshall Scholarship
source: British Government – Marshall Aid Commemoration Commission
eligibility: Young Americans of high ability who can make a significant contribution to their own society, and act as ambassador for the US-UK relationship. Any field of study at any UK university.
documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through your university's pre-approval process and the Marshall Scholarship online portal.
provider_name: British Government – Marshall Aid Commemoration Commission
application_instructions: Apply through your university's pre-approval process and the Marshall Scholarship online portal.

title: Forte Research Grants
source: Forte – Swedish Research Council for Health, Working Life and Welfare
eligibility: Researchers at Swedish institutions working on public health, working life, or welfare. Supports research on social conditions and human well-being.
documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through the Forte online application portal.
provider_name: Forte – Swedish Research Council for Health, Working Life and Welfare
application_instructions: Apply through the Forte online application portal.

title: KK Foundation Research Grants
source: KK Foundation (Stiftelsen för Kunskaps- och Kompetensutveckling)

instructions: Apply through the KK Foundation grant portal.
provider_name: KK Foundation (Stiftelsen för Kunskaps- och Kompetensutveckling)
application_instructions: Apply through the KK Foundation grant portal.

eligibility: Students and researchers at Swedish universities or conducting research in Sweden. Grants cover research-related travel, equipment, conference attendance, and fieldwork.

instructions: Apply through the Lars Hiertas Minne online grant portal.
scholarship_name: Lars Hiertas Minne Foundation Research Grant
application_instructions: Apply through the Lars Hiertas Minne online grant portal.
